title: Reconcile bank account with missing expense
objective: Verify that a discrepancy on a Bank account leads to an Unrecorded Expense correction transaction that restores the correct balance

steps.step: Open Reconciliation for 'Bank', enter actual balance = 970
Tap 'Create Correction' — system pre-fills 'Unrecorded Expense' of 30
steps.expected_result: Correction transaction form shows amount = 30 (locked), type = Unrecorded Expense

steps.step: Add optional note 'ATM fee not recorded', tap Save
steps.expected_result: Correction saved. Bank balance now shows 970.
A '⚖ Reconciliation Adjustment' entry of −30 appears, clearly distinct from regular expenses
